ddls:
CREATE TABLE "damage_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each damage report */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the damage report */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the damage occurred */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the damage occurred */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the commodity (crop) affected */,
  "damage_cause_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cause of the damage */,
  "month_code" INTEGER /* Month code (numeric representation of the month) */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the damage report (e.g., SEP, AUG) */,
  "acres" REAL /* Total acres affected by the damage */,
  "loss" REAL /* Total loss in monetary value */,
  "loss_per_acre" REAL /* Loss per acre */,
  "crop_year" INTEGER /* Crop year (the year the crop was planted or harvested) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was submitted */,
  "submitted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., initial, follow-up, final) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the affected area */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the affected area */,
  "estimated_recovery_time" TEXT /* Estimated time for recovery */,
  "is_insured" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the crop is insured */,
  "insurance_claim_amount" REAL /* Amount claimed from insurance (if applicable) */,
  "additional_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_damage_reports_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_damage_reports_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_damage_reports_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_damage_reports_damage_cause_id FOREIGN KEY ("damage_cause_id") REFERENCES damage_causes ("damage_cause_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_damage_reports_submitted_by FOREIGN KEY ("submitted_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region to which the state belongs (e.g., Northeast, Midwest) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the state in square miles */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the state */,
  "governor" TEXT /* Name of the governor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for the state's agricultural department */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for the state's agricultural department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the county is located */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the county in square miles */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the county */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Average elevation of the county */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for the county's agricultural extension office */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for the county's agricultural extension office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commodities" (
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commodity */,
  "commodity_name" TEXT /* Name of the commodity */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the commodity (e.g., grains, fruits) */,
  "growing_season" TEXT /* Growing season for the commodity */,
  "yield_per_acre" REAL /* Average yield per acre */,
  "market_value_per_ton" REAL /* Market value per ton of the commodity */,
  "sensitivity_to_weather" TEXT /* Sensitivity to weather conditions (e.g., drought, frost) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commodity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "damage_causes" (
  "damage_cause_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each damage cause */,
  "damage_cause_name" TEXT /* Name of the damage cause */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the damage cause */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the damage cause (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "estimated_recovery_time" TEXT /* Estimated time for recovery from the damage cause */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of occurrence (e.g., rare, occasional, frequent) */,
  "preventive_measures" TEXT /* Preventive measures that can be taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("damage_cause_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher, field officer) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the damage report the attachment belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the attachment */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the attachment in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the attachment was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., image, document) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the attachment */,
  "is_confidential" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the attachment is confidential */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_attachments_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES damage_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the damage report the note belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the note */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the note was added */,
  "is_confidential" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the note is confidential */,
  "is_important" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the note is important */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the note (e.g., initial assessment, follow-up, final report) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_notes_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES damage_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_status_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status change */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the damage report the status change belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the status change */,
  "old_status" TEXT /* Previous status of the report */,
  "new_status" TEXT /* New status of the report */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the status change was made */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status change */,
  "is_automated" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the status change was automated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_status_changes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_status_changes_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES damage_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the commodity */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the data (e.g., JAN, FEB) */,
  "crop_yield" REAL /* Crop yield (tons per acre) */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Average temperature (°F) */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Total precipitation (inches) */,
  "extreme_weather_events" INTEGER /* Number of extreme weather events in the month */,
  "disease_incidence" INTEGER /* Incidence of crop diseases */,
  "pest_incidence" INTEGER /* Incidence of crop pests */,
  "soil_moisture" REAL /* Average soil moisture level */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Average wind speed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the role is a default role */,
  "can_assign_roles" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the role can assign roles to other users */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "is_system_permission" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the permission is a system-level permission */,
  "is_restricted" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the permission is restricted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the damage report the response belongs to */,
  "response_type" TEXT /* Type of response (e.g., financial aid, technical assistance) */,
  "response_text" TEXT /* Text of the response */,
  "date_taken" TEXT /* Date the response was taken */,
  "funding_amount" REAL /* Amount of funding provided (if applicable) */,
  "resources_provided" TEXT /* List of resources provided (e.g., seeds, fertilizers) */,
  "follow_up_required" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if follow-up is required */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date for the follow-up */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_responses_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES damage_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monthly_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monthly summary */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the summary */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the summary (e.g., JAN, FEB) */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "total_acres" REAL /* Total acres affected in the month */,
  "total_loss" REAL /* Total loss in the month */,
  "total_reports" INTEGER /* Total number of damage reports in the month */,
  "total_insured_acres" REAL /* Total acres that are insured */,
  "total_insurance_claim_amount" REAL /* Total amount claimed from insurance */,
  "average_recovery_time" TEXT /* Average recovery time for the month */,
  "number_of_insured_reports" INTEGER /* Number of insured damage reports */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monthly_summary_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monthly_summary_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)
